name: Pleiades
description: Young open cluster. Bright labelled members use curated J2000 sky positions projected at the cluster mean distance; unresolved members are visual only.

name: Hyades
description: Very nearby dispersed open cluster. Its apparent spread is intentionally larger than the compact Pleiades population.

name: Praesepe
description: Old nearby open cluster, shown as a compact stellar population.

name: α Per
description: Young open cluster around Mirfak, represented by a broad stellar population.

name: IC 2391
description: Young southern open cluster. The member stars are schematic bright anchors inside the cluster population.

name: IC 2602
description: Young southern open cluster, also known as the Southern Pleiades.

name: NGC 2451A
description: Young nearby open cluster candidate/complex shown as a compact local stellar population.
